# Summit View Landscape LLC

> Professional landscaping company based in Nampa, Idaho, serving the Treasure Valley and surrounding areas.

## About

Summit View Landscape is a locally owned and operated landscaping company in Nampa, Idaho. We provide residential and commercial landscaping services across the Treasure Valley, including Nampa, Boise, Meridian, Eagle, Star, Caldwell, and Kuna. Our owner, Micah, holds a degree in horticulture and landscape design. We are licensed, insured, and maintain a 5.0-star rating.

## Services

- Landscape Install: Custom landscape design, flower beds, shrubs, sod installation, grading, mulch, rock, drainage solutions
- Hardscaping: Paver and stone patios, retaining walls, walkways, fire pits, edging, decorative rock
- Sprinklers: New system installation, repair, seasonal start-up and winterization, drip irrigation, smart controllers
- Maintenance: Weekly and bi-weekly mowing, edging, trimming, hedge care, weed control, seasonal clean-ups
- Tree Care: Trimming, pruning, tree and stump removal, storm damage clean-up, canopy thinning
- Fertilizer: Custom lawn fertilization, weed and feed, soil testing, pre-emergent prevention, organic options
- Spring & Fall Clean-Up: Leaf removal, bed clean-out, gutter cleaning, debris hauling, dethatching, aeration
- Snow Removal: Driveway and walkway clearing, parking lot plowing, ice melt, seasonal contracts, emergency response

## Service Area

Nampa, Boise, Meridian, Eagle, Star, Caldwell, Kuna, and the greater Treasure Valley in Idaho.
